title: Severianus the bishop.

source.title: NPNF2-03. Theodoret, Jerome, Gennadius, & Rufinus: Historical Writings

verses.text: Severianus, bishop of the church of Gabala, was learned in the Holy Scriptures and a wonderful preacher of homilies.
On this account he was frequently summoned by the bishop John and the emperor Arcadius to preach a sermon at Constantinople.
I have read his Exposition of the epistle to the Galatians and a most attractive little work On baptism and the feast of Epiphany.
He died in the reign of Theodosius, his son by baptism.
